_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: NF1-PANCO (Mir, 48% reduction; Tra, 87% reduction in %Ki67+ cells)
details: Caused 87% reduction in Ki67+ cells in NF1-PANCOs and reduced ERK1/2 phosphorylation
